violations.description: Existing-thread scenario validates timeline order and presence but uses a non-strict count assertion (>0).
violations.suggestion: Capture baseline count pre-webhook and assert +1 post-webhook for tighter cardinality guarantees.

recommendations: Retain replay duplicate suppression cardinality check introduced in E2-ATDD-API-003
Tighten existing-thread event count to strict delta where practical
Keep refusal and concurrency scenarios as story-level baseline coverage
summary: Coverage is strong across AC1-AC4 plus refusal and concurrency contracts; only one low-severity assertion-tightness opportunity remains.
